summary_en: Final dividend raised ¥10/share to ¥65 (from ¥55 prior forecast). Combined with interim dividend of ¥50, annual dividend reaches ¥115/share for FY3/26, marking 11th consecutive year of dividend increases. Next fiscal year annual dividend forecast at ¥130/share (interim ¥65).
title_en: Notification regarding revision (increase) of dividend forecast for fiscal year ending March 2026
translation_en_brief: Kamei Corporation announced on 14 May 2026 that its board of directors approved an upward revision to the dividend forecast for fiscal year ending March 2026. The final (end-of-year) dividend has been increased by ¥10 per share to ¥65, from the prior forecast of ¥55. Combined with the interim dividend of ¥50 already paid, the full-year dividend reaches ¥115 per share. This marks the 11th consecutive year of dividend increases. The company stated that the revision reflects its long-term management policy on shareholder returns, updated in May 2025, combined with current fiscal-year performance and consideration of the payout ratio. For the following fiscal year (FY3/27), the company forecasts an annual dividend of ¥130 per share, comprising an interim dividend of ¥65 and an implied final dividend of ¥65.
